title: LS Datapack Resources
description: A resource pack for the custom items, music, and translations for my datapacks
body:
Resources for my datapacks; Ultris and Spellbound Weapons. Provides assets like item textures, music, and text translations in other languages.

# Credits

### Ultris

- Blaze King Boss Music: [**_humanoid#9909**](https://modrinth.com/user/_humanoid)
- Simplified Chineese Translation: **MickeyMiao#1186**
- Russian Translation **v_muted#9624**
- Ukranian Translation: **Sprechstallmeister#6823**
- French Translation: **TheWiseDragon#2727**
- Brazilian Portuguese: **MeiaQuatru#7959**

### Spellbound Weapons

- Spanish Translation: [**ItsMemed**](https://twitter.com/itsmemed_554)
- Russian Translation **v_muted#9624**
- Ukranian Translation: **Sprechstallmeister#6823**
- Simplified Chineese Translation: **Radical#4086**
- Portuguese Translation: **???**
- French Translation: **TheWiseDragon#2727**
- Brazilian Portuguese: **MeiaQuatru#7959**

### Refined Advancements

- Mexican Spanish Translation: [**ItsMemed**](https://twitter.com/itsmemed_554)
- French Translation: **TheWiseDragon#2727**
- Brazilian Portuguese: **MeiaQuatru#7959**
